case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINCOLN GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,153.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
